summary: Tested Universal Size Standardization across Bulk Orders, POD Design, Boutique, and Admin Inventory pages. All size categories implemented correctly: Male (S, M, L, XL, 2XL, Other), Female (6, 8, 10, 12, 14, Other), Child (2, 4, 6, 8, 10, Other). 'Other' custom input appears when qty > 0 for Bulk and when selected for POD. Boutique correctly shows admin-defined sizes only without 'Other' option for guests.

bulk_orders_page.male_sizes_display: PASS - Shows S, M, L, XL, 2XL, Other
bulk_orders_page.male_other_custom_input: PASS - Custom text input appears when 'Other' qty > 0
bulk_orders_page.female_other_custom_input: PASS - Custom text input appears when 'Other' qty > 0
bulk_orders_page.child_other_custom_input: PASS - Custom text input appears when 'Other' qty > 0
bulk_orders_page.data_testid_selectors: PASS - All size inputs have proper data-testid attributes

pod_design_page.gender_options: PASS - Male, Female, Child buttons displayed
pod_design_page.male_sizes_display: PASS - When Male selected, shows S, M, L, XL, 2XL, Other
pod_design_page.female_sizes_display: PASS - When Female selected, shows 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, Other
pod_design_page.child_sizes_display: PASS - When Child selected, shows 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, Other
pod_design_page.custom_size_input: PASS - Custom size input appears when 'Other' is selected
pod_design_page.default_size_changes: PASS - Default size changes per gender (M for Male, 8 for Female, 6 for Child)

boutique_page.size_modal_trigger: PASS - Size selection modal appears when adding clothing items
boutique_page.sizes_in_modal: PASS - Modal shows admin-defined sizes (S, M, L, XL, 2XL for male product)
boutique_page.no_other_option: PASS - No 'Other' option in boutique size modal (admin-defined only)

admin_inventory_page.add_product_modal: PASS - Add New Boutique Product modal opens
admin_inventory_page.gender_selection: PASS - Male, Female, Child gender buttons available
admin_inventory_page.size_checkboxes_male: PASS - Male sizes S, M, L, XL, 2XL available as checkboxes
admin_inventory_page.size_checkboxes_female: PASS - Female sizes 6, 8, 10, 12, 14 available when Female selected
admin_inventory_page.size_checkboxes_child: PASS - Child sizes 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 available when Child selected
admin_inventory_page.no_other_for_admin: PASS - No 'Other' option in admin size checkboxes (correct per requirement)

Boutique - Size Modal.description: Shows admin-defined sizes only (no 'Other' option for guests)

Admin Inventory - Size Checkboxes.description: Size checkboxes change based on gender selection

BulkOrdersPage.js.data_testid: Proper data-testid attributes for all size inputs and custom inputs

PrintOnDemandDesignPage.js.getSizesForGender: Function returns correct sizes based on gender

BoutiquePage.js.getAvailableSizes: Uses admin-defined sizes or defaults, NO 'Other' option

AdminInventoryPage.js.getGenderSizes: Function returns correct sizes based on gender selection

critical_code_review_comments: All size arrays correctly implemented per requirements
Custom size inputs properly conditionally rendered
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
Boutique correctly excludes 'Other' option for guest size selection

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All universal size standardization features working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal sizes fully implemented: Male (S, M, L, XL, 2XL, Other), Female (6, 8, 10, 12, 14, Other), Child (2, 4, 6, 8, 10, Other). Bulk Orders and POD have 'Other' with custom input. Boutique uses admin-defined sizes only (no Other for guests). Admin can select gender and checkbox sizes when adding boutique products.
